channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: Modi’s Frugality Warning Flags Twin Shock for India - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Modi’s Frugality Warning Flags Twin Shock for India Bloomberg.com

item.title: Rule-Based Fuel Pricing in India: Managing Oil Volatility, Inflation & Energy Security - Daily Pioneer
item.description: Rule-Based Fuel Pricing in India: Managing Oil Volatility, Inflation & Energy Security Daily Pioneer

item.title: The U.S. Navy's Only Forward-Deployed Aircraft Carrier Just Left Yokosuka With 3,100 Sailors as China Expands Its Own Carrier Fleet - National Security Journal
item.description: The U.S. Navy's Only Forward-Deployed Aircraft Carrier Just Left Yokosuka With 3,100 Sailors as China Expands Its Own Carrier Fleet National Security Journal

item.title: Gold Steady as Traders Track Hormuz Stalemate, Inflation Risks
item.description: Gold was steady as traders assessed the deadlock in the Strait of Hormuz that has sent oil prices higher and added further fuel to inflation concerns.

item.title: New Delhi to Mumbai: Air India Shakes India as 1,000 Dreams Shatter in Massive Staff Layoff - Travel And Tour World
item.description: New Delhi to Mumbai: Air India Shakes India as 1,000 Dreams Shatter in Massive Staff Layoff Travel And Tour World

item.title: GameStop Shares Roiled by Short-Lived Roaring Kitty Tweets
item.description: GameStop Corp. shares spiked and then quickly dropped in postmarket trading Monday after cryptic social media posts showed up and then disappeared from the social media account of Keith Gill, the financial influencer known as “Roaring Kitty,” who became prominent during the 2021 meme-stock craze.

item.title: US Unleashes Another Wave of Emergency Oil as Gas Prices Bite
item.description: The US Strategic Petroleum Reserve awarded 53.3 million barrels to companies including oil trader Trafigura Group and US refiner Marathon Petroleum Corp, adding to a wave of oil released to help tame surging prices stemming from the Iran war.

item.title: Gen Z Shoppers Driving Traffic Growth at Simon’s Malls, CEO Says
item.description: Mall owner Simon Property Group Inc. is seeing strong interest from Gen Z shoppers and the brands that target them, Chief Executive Officer Eli Simon said on a call with investors.

item.title: Oil Holds Gain as Trump Casts Doubt Over Ceasefire With Iran
item.description: Oil steadied as US President Donald Trump cast doubt over the ceasefire with Iran after rejecting Tehran’s latest peace offer, prolonging the effective closure of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Asian Stocks to Rise, Oil Gains on Iran Deadlock: Markets Wrap
item.description: Asian stocks looked set to rise as traders stayed bullish on the AI trade even as the US and Iran failed to reach any peace deal. Oil climbed and Treasuries fell.

item.title: New GhostLock tool abuses Windows API to block file access
item.description: A security researcher has released a proof-of-concept tool named GhostLock that demonstrates how a legitimate Windows file API can be abused in attacks to block access to files stored locally or on SMB network shares. [...]

item.title: China Investors Bet Xi-Trump Meet to Extend Trade-Detente Rally
item.description: China investors are counting on the summit between Xi Jinping and Donald Trump to deliver just enough to sustain the detente trade underpinning stocks and the yuan.

item.title: Rs 76,000 Crore Annual Profit Of State Oil Firms Could Be Wiped Out By Q1 Losses
item.description: A report said losses suffered by IOC, BPCL and HPCL in April-June quarter may wipe out their entire annual profit of Rs 76,000 crore.

item.title: Sunshine Silver Files for IPO Seeking Funds to Reopen Idaho Mine
item.description: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. filed for a US initial public offering, and is seeking funds to restart a mine in Idaho that previously produced silver, antimony and other minerals.

item.title: Is Russia the Main Beneficiary of Trump’s Iran Mistake?
item.description: The Kremlin is gaining billions in additional oil revenue.

item.title: Modi’s appeal on gold a failure of Centre’s foreign policy: Revanth - The Times of India
item.description: Modi’s appeal on gold a failure of Centre’s foreign policy: Revanth The Times of India

item.title: War, breaking news. Trump: Iran ceasefire is very weak, 1% chance of holding - Il Sole 24 ORE
item.description: War, breaking news. Trump: Iran ceasefire is very weak, 1% chance of holding Il Sole 24 ORE

item.title: Inside IAF’s New AI-Driven Air Defence Shield to Counter Drone Swarms and Missile Threats in Seconds - Indianmasterminds
item.description: Inside IAF’s New AI-Driven Air Defence Shield to Counter Drone Swarms and Missile Threats in Seconds Indianmasterminds

item.title: PM Modi repackaging failure as moral advice, says Congress
item.description: Opposition parties are criticizing PM Modi's call for austerity amidst the West Asia crisis, labeling it a tactic to evade accountability for economic failures. Leaders like Rahul Gandhi and Mallikarjun Kharge argue the PM is shifting responsibility onto the public. Akhilesh Yadav and Tejashwi Yadav also questioned the timing and perceived hypocrisy of these austerity demands.

item.title: Ackman’s Pershing Seeks to Toss Suit Over Howard Hughes Deal
item.description: Pershing Square sought to toss what it called a “facially defective” shareholder lawsuit accusing founder Bill Ackman of bullying Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. directors into a deal that increased the investment firm’s stake at an unfairly low price.

item.title: Google says it likely thwarted effort by hacker group to use AI for 'mass exploitation event'
item.description: Hackers are rapidly adopting AI to find previously unknown software flaws even without the help of Anthropic's powerful Mythos model.

item.title: Central Banks in Wait-and-See Mode: Kochugovindan
item.description: Aberdeen Senior Research Economist Sree Kochugovindan, says inflation expectations remain anchored for now and monetary policy remains on hold for the BOE, ECB and the Federal Reserve for the rest of the year. She speaks to Bloomberg's Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Anna Edwards on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Media Mogul Byron Allen to Buy Control of BuzzFeed
item.description: Billionaire media mogul Byron Allen is to buy control of BuzzFeed for $120 million, rescuing the struggling digital media firm from likely extinction. The company announced the deal while reporting a 12.4% drop in first quarter revenue and a slightly increased net loss. As part of the deal, ...

item.title: Hundreds displaced, medical services suspended amid gang violence in Haiti
item.description: Aid group Doctors Without Borders suspends hospital operations because of safety concerns following gunfire.

item.title: Starmer faces Labour revolt as MPs openly call for UK PM to resign after disastrous local election results
item.description: Several junior government aides resigned from their posts on Monday (May 11) and publicly questioned Starmer’s ability to continue leading the party.

item.title: EU Takes Aim at Russia’s Abductions of Ukrainian Children
item.description: Around 20,500 minors have been kidnapped since war broke out in February 2022.

item.title: ‘Messi was unhappy, protested my arrest’: Event organiser Satadru Dutta claims over football icon’s chaotic India tour (Ld) - Social News XYZ
item.description: ‘Messi was unhappy, protested my arrest’: Event organiser Satadru Dutta claims over football icon’s chaotic India tour (Ld) Social News XYZ

item.title: Circle Raises Funding at $3 Billion Valuation for Arc Blockchain
item.description: Circle, the stablecoin issuer of USDC, jumped 16% Monday after reporting revenue growth and announcing a fundraising for its planned blockchain. The company said it raised $222 million for Arc, a stablecoin-focused blockchain, at a $3 billion valuation from investors including a16z crypto, ...

item.title: EU, UK sanction Russians over deportations of Ukrainian children
item.description: Russian institutions and officials accused of systemic deportation and indoctrination of children during war on Ukraine.

item.title: Market Still Expecting Strait of Hormuz to Reopen: Renaud-Chatelain
item.description: Pictet Wealth Management Senior Fixed Income Strategist Laureline Renaud-Chatelain says short-term inflation rates have not priced in the worse-case scenario of an extended closure of the Strait of Hormuz. She speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie, Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Tables Turned: Gentlemen Ransomware Group Suffers Data Leak - BankInfoSecurity
item.description: Tables Turned: Gentlemen Ransomware Group Suffers Data Leak BankInfoSecurity

item.title: Redistricting war isn't over, Democrats say as Jeffries calls a meeting this week
item.description: Democrats are vowing to fight on after being dealt a series of blows in the partisan fight to redraw congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterms.

item.title: ​Belated warning: On the Prime Minister’s austerity appeal
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s suggestions to Indians imply a serious economic impact

item.title: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security - News On AIR
item.description: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security News On AIR

item.title: April home sales disappoint as higher mortgage rates weigh on buyers
item.description: Home sales barely moved in April, as mortgage rates shot higher the month before and uncertainty over the war with Iran weighed on consumers.

item.title: US stocks today: S&P 500 inches to higher close, AI fervor edges out Iran impasse
item.description: US stocks closed slightly higher as AI-driven momentum lifted semiconductor shares, even as rising crude prices and stalled US-Iran talks kept inflation worries alive. Strong earnings supported sentiment, with over 80% S&P 500 firms beating estimates. Focus now shifts to US inflation data and key macroeconomic indicators this week.

item.title: India to Deploy First Tejas Mk1A Squadrons Near Pakistan Border, IAF Powerful Strategy Revealed - Indianmasterminds
item.description: India to Deploy First Tejas Mk1A Squadrons Near Pakistan Border, IAF Powerful Strategy Revealed Indianmasterminds

item.title: Tech Can't Stop These Threats — Your People Can
item.description: Security controls can do only so much. Here are four attacks where your employees are usually your first, and only, line of cyber defense.

item.title: Trump Warns Mideast Truce On "Life Support", Iran Says Ready For Any Aggression
item.description: "The ceasefire is on massive life support", Donald Trump said.

item.title: J&K CM Abdullah retracts statement on liquor in face of growing criticism
item.description: Earlier, Mr. Abdullah, speaking on demands to ban liquor, said, “No one was forcing locals to consume liquor”
